new_claims.claim_text: Images and videos are being dismissed as AI-created due to public skepticism regarding digital content authenticity.
new_claims.notes: Observed in comments on posts featuring visual media, including a 'soup' video and an Earth image. Also relates to epistemic integrity.

new_claims.claim_text: Grok Imagine Pro mode for 1080P images & video will be available later this month.
new_claims.notes: Claim about future AI product capability.

new_claims.claim_text: Grok video games are going to be incredible.
new_claims.notes: Claim about future AI product capability.
